research_chain.summary: All Bonferroni-corrected p > 0.04. Hit-rate edge NULL after bias correction. Second-zone display-only confirmed.
Windows: short 100/125/150, mid 500/750/1000, all-history=reference. Anti-overfit gate active.

research_chain.description: Cross-lottery feature-discovery scan (35 strategies x 3 lotteries)

One survivor on overlapping P222 slice: midfreq_fourier_2bet/DAILY_539 CROSS_YEAR_CONFIRMED. Others: NEEDS_MORE_OOS/WEAK_OBSERVATION/REJECTED.

research_chain.description: DAILY_539 survivor deeper validation — clean deduplicated slice
research_chain.summary: 1500 distinct draws. p=0.0674 (fails 0.05). CI [0.632, 0.706] crosses baseline. 6/10 blocks above. Edge rests on 19 hit=3 rows. Honest prior: lean NULL.

roadmap.md §0.1 + CURRENT_STATE.md updated. Stale windows corrected. Survivor WAIT_FOR_OOS recorded.

3_STAR 4179 draws; 4_STAR 2922 draws. Replay rows=0 for both. Sorted DB storage causes positional order loss. Straight-play BLOCKED. Box-play feasible. Baselines: 3_STAR 1/120=0.00833; 4_STAR 1/210=0.00476.

star_box_exact_match (Counter/multiset), star_digit_overlap_count, star_calculate_box_score. calculate_match_score prohibited. dry_run=1 isolation. 4-layer authorization boundary. Power warning: 3_STAR needs ~10k draws; 4_STAR ~17k.
lottery_api/models/star_box_play.py. 42/42 targeted tests PASS. No DB write. calculate_match_score not used (AST test).

research_chain.description: Star box-play dry-run scan (120 hypotheses, power gate)
research_chain.summary: 3_STAR: 0 Bonferroni, 1 BH-FDR weak (F7_high_low/w750, p=0.0008, UNDERPOWERED n_oos=2090<10000). 4_STAR: 0 Bonferroni, 0 BH-FDR. 69/69 tests PASS. Both UNDERPOWERED_NO_SIGNAL.
roadmap.md + CURRENT_STATE.md updated to reflect P226-P227C. 3_STAR/4_STAR UNDERPOWERED_NO_SIGNAL and STRAIGHT_PLAY_BLOCKED_REINGEST_REQUIRED recorded.
Comprehensive closeout report for P211A-P228. No new research. No DB write.

A_stop_passive_monitoring.description: No new research. Wait for >=300-500 new DAILY_539 draws; recheck per P224B.

B_daily539_backward_oos_extension.description: Use ~4376 un-replayed older DAILY_539 draws to resolve survivor p=0.0674.
B_daily539_backward_oos_extension.authorization_needed: explicit DB-write / backfill authorization; inherits P224B gates

C_star_straight_play_reingestion_plan_on.description: Design plan-only protocol for re-ingesting star draws with positional order. No DB write in plan phase.
C_star_straight_play_reingestion_plan_on.authorization_needed: code-change scope for re-ingestion script; separate DB-write for actual data
C_star_straight_play_reingestion_plan_on.recommended: only if user wants to pursue star straight-play

D_wait_for_new_draws.description: DAILY_539 draws arrive ~6/week. 300 new draws ~50 weeks; 500 draws ~83 weeks.

E_archive_and_pause.description: Close all active worker tasks. Retain artifacts. No further research until user restarts.

risks_and_blind_spots: Overfitting via multiple comparisons — re-scanning same data without new draws manufactures false positives
Underpowered star lottery tests — 3_STAR/4_STAR far below required draw counts
Sorted storage limitations — positional order lost; straight-play impossible from current data
Repeated-digit ambiguity — 0 repeats observed but schema allows them; baseline may shift if repeats appear
DAILY_539 survivor fragility — edge rests on 19 out of 1500 rows; classic noise hallmark
Future OOS dependence — 300-500 new DAILY_539 draws takes 50-83 weeks at current rate
P223B over-promotion risk — CROSS_YEAR_CONFIRMED on overlapping slice overturned by P224 dedup; P224 is authoritative
Governance drift — future agents must read CURRENT_STATE.md (updated through P228) as authoritative

final_recommendation.preferred_action: Option A or E: passive monitoring or archive and pause
final_recommendation.if_user_wants_faster_resolution: Option B: backward-OOS extension with explicit DB-write authorization
final_recommendation.if_user_wants_star_lotteries: Option C: plan-only re-ingestion design (no DB write in plan phase)
final_recommendation.summary: No deployable signal found across P211A-P228. Research chain is complete. Wait for new data or pause.
